title: D-ND Meta-lab
description: The first lab operating at system level — produces cognitive seeds (seed.json + context.md + about.md + assertions.py) for new domain labs. Output is not findings on a domain but templates that, once installed, generate domain labs that produce findings.

params.comment: meta-lab non ha grafo numerico classico — disabilitato
meta-lab produce template, non findings scientifici — SSP non applicabile
Distilla cycle output in narrativa Apple-like ~200 parole.

input_schema.domain_request: free-form string describing the target domain
input_schema.corpus_path: optional path or URL to external corpus
input_schema.tension_hints: optional list of dipolar tensions the operator already sees

output_schema.seed: seed.json structure for target domain (domain, tensioni[], direzione, direzione_en)

_notes.level: meta — operates on system structure, not on a domain material
_notes.first_test: regenerate physics from internal corpus and validate diff vs original
_notes.falsifier: M1-M7 (vedi context.md). Domains failing 1+ go to cimitero come not-of-leverage.
